suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Define a canonical evidence-path convention for validation artifacts (prefer repo-relative paths over machine-specific absolute paths) to keep reports portable across machines and workers.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Deploy-evidence flow artifacts use absolute Windows screenshot paths in `.factory/validation/deploy-evidence/user-testing/flows/deployed-cross-routes.json`, while prior milestone flow artifacts use relative paths in `.factory/validation/blog-and-deploy/user-testing/flows/cross-area.json`.
